items.name: Abyssal Wings: Embercore Interstellar Wings
items.description:
Forged in the heart of a celestial blaze, the Embercore Interstellar Wings ignite with molten brilliance and primal beauty. Their vibrant orange glow pulses like the embers of a star long extinguished, yet still burning within. Each feather carries the memory of ancient solar flares and the timeless warmth of astral fire.

Price: 1000/10 stock
Purchase Game: https://www.roblox.com/games/73736600148167
